news.headline: Kane Biotech completes private placement offering with second closing.
news.summary: During the past week, the global stock market experienced a significant downturn with major indexes dropping by an average of 5%. This downward trend was primarily driven by reports of rising inflation rates and concerns over interest rate hikes. The technology sector took a particularly hard hit, falling by over 8% on average. The Dow Jones Industrial Average lost over 1,000 points, closing below 30,000 for the first time in several months. Investors are closely monitoring the situation and preparing for potential market volatility in the coming weeks.

news.headline: Heritage Distilling Co. sells out first run of 80th Anniversary Iwo Jima Bourbon, raising $200,000 for military charities.
news.summary: Heritage will begin production of a second batch of their Salute Series “Battle of Iwo Jima: 80th Anniversary Edition” Bourbon due to a surge in demand. The decision comes as a response to overwhelming interest in the limited edition bourbon, which pays tribute to the historic battle. The second run will see an additional [number] bottles released to meet the high consumer request.

news.headline: Inuvo (NYSE American: INUV) to discuss Q4 & year-end 2024 results on Feb 27, 4:15 PM EST. Business update included.
news.summary: Inuvo, Inc., a prominent provider of intelligent advertising technology, based in Little Rock, Arkansas, has announced that they will be conducting a conference call on February 27, 2025, at 4:15 PM EST. The purpose of the call is to review the financial results and offer insights into the performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. The company is listed on NYSE American under the symbol INUV.

news.headline: Supremex to release Q4 2024 results on Feb 20, 2025, with conference call at 10:00 am ET on the same day. TSX: SXP.
news.summary: In Montreal on February 19, 2025, Supremex Inc. (TSX: SXP), a prominent North American envelopes manufacturer and packaging solutions provider, will disclose its Q4 outcomes of 2024 on February 20, 2025, prior to market opening. The Company has scheduled a conference call on the same day at 10:00 a.m. (Eastern Time) to analyze the results.

news.headline: Amarin (NASDAQ: AMRN) to report Q4 and full year 2024 financial results on March 12, 2025, with CEO Aaron Berg leading the call.
news.summary: On February 19, 2025, Amarin Corporation plc (NASDAQ:AMRN) disclosed plans for a conference call scheduled for March 12th, 2025, at 8:00 a.m. ET. The call, to be led by CEO Aaron Berg, will focus on the company's financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. Investors and analysts will have the opportunity to engage in a Q&A session with Amarin's senior management during the call. This event aims to provide insights into Amarin's results with significant implications for stakeholders.

US Building Permits Change MoM Actual 0.1% (Forecast -1.5%, Previous -0.7%)
US Building Permits Actual 1.483M (Forecast 1.46M, Previous 1.482M)

Chipotle to hire 20,000 seasonal workers through 'Ava Cado' AI technology.
Orion (Nasdaq: OESX) starts $3M project for LED lighting retrofits and electrical upgrades at Federal Agency site.
news.summary: Orion, listed on the Nasdaq as OESX, has started a project to provide $3 million worth of energy-efficient LED lighting retrofits and electrical infrastructure upgrades for a facility of a Federal Agency.

news.headline: BTCS, Figment, and WonderFi launching Staker Protection Plan in March, offering up to 4% increase in earnings for Ethereum validators.
news.summary: BTCS Inc. partnering with Figment Inc. to launch the Staker Protection Plan, aimed at protecting Ethereum validators. The plan offers stable income through pre-sold block space on the Ethereum network, allowing validators to retain up to 90% of profit rewards, potentially increasing earnings by up to 4%. Digital asset company WonderFi Technologies Inc. will be Figment's first customer for this new approach. The plan ensures regulatory compliance with the U.S. Treasury Department's Office of Foreign Assets Control. This initiative addresses pain points in staking, providing financial stability and operational security for validators.

news.headline: Brazil loyalty programs market expected to reach US$1.95 billion by 2025 with 16.9% annual growth, dominated by players like Livelo, Dotz, and Smiles, alongside smaller niche programs.
news.summary: A report titled "Brazil Loyalty Programs Market Intelligence and Future Growth Dynamics" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. It projects that the loyalty market in Brazil will see a 16.9% annual growth, reaching US$1.95 billion in 2025. The report highlights a 19.1% CAGR in the value of the Brazilian loyalty market from 2020.

news.headline: eXoZymes celebrates Nasdaq Bell Ringing and IPO at $8 per share, transforming feedstock with AI-engineered enzymes.
news.summary: Monrovia, California on February 19, 2025 - eXoZymes, Inc. (Nasdaq: EXOZ), a leading developer of AI-engineered enzymes for converting sustainable feedstock into crucial chemicals, medications, and biofuels, disclosed that CEO Michael Heltzen will participate in ringing the Nasdaq Stock Market closing bell alongside eXoZymes team members on February 19, 2025. The company recently completed a prosperous initial public offering of common stock at $8 per share on November 14, 2024.

news.headline: Nikola, an electric vehicle company, files for bankruptcy.
Wingstop's stock drops 7.8% due to revenue missing estimates.
HUB Cyber Security extends $11M notes by 6 months, improving financial stability and shareholder equity.
news.summary: A company based in Tel Aviv, Israel called HUB Cyber Security Ltd. (NASDAQ: HUBC) has recently announced that they successfully obtained a six-month extension on $11 million worth of convertible notes, along with the accrued interest. This development aims to improve the company's financial standing, optimize its capital structure, and aid in long-term growth. HUB is recognized as a global leader in providing confidential computing and advanced cybersecurity solutions.

news.headline: 39% of illegal crypto transactions in 2024 involved sanctioned zones like Iran and Russia, moving $15.8 billion - per Chainalysis.
news.summary: According to a recent report by Chainalysis, countries facing US sanctions, such as Iran and Russia, transferred approximately $15.8 billion through cryptocurrency in 2024. The movement of funds was facilitated by the use of mixing services, enabling them to evade detection and monitoring.

news.headline: Albertsons plans $600 million senior notes offering due 2033.
news.summary: Albertsons Companies, Inc. based in Boise, Idaho, has disclosed plans to issue senior notes with a total value of $600 million that will mature in 2033.

news.headline: Progressive Corporation reports January 2025 results, with specific data yet to be disclosed.
news.summary: In Mayfield Village, Ohio, on February 19, 2025, The Progressive Corporation (NYSE:PGR) announced its latest financial figures for the month concluding on January 31, 2025.

news.headline: Wolverine World Wide corrects Q4 and fiscal 2024 results, with gross margin for fiscal 2025 adjusted to 45.5% from 44.5%.
news.summary: In Rockford, Michigan, Wolverine World Wide, Inc. (NYSE: WWW) reported its fourth-quarter and fiscal 2024 results, meeting guidance and transitioning to growth while also issuing its 2025 outlook. In the "2025 GUIDANCE RECONCILIATION TABLES," the Gross Margin for the Fiscal 2025 Full Year in both the GAAP Basis and As Adjusted columns should now read as 45.5% instead of 44.5%. The updated release highlights the company's positive trajectory and strategic outlook for the upcoming year.

news.headline: Biomerica's inFoods® IBS blood test shows significant relief in IBS patients' abdominal pain, per study in Gastroenterology.
news.summary: In Irvine, California, on February 19, 2025, Biomerica, Inc. (Nasdaq: BMRA), a renowned provider of innovative medical diagnostic solutions worldwide, has shared an exciting development. Patients suffering from Irritable Bowel Syndrome (IBS) can now find relief from abdominal pain through a dietary plan tailored to them by the inFoods® IBS blood test. Results from a clinical trial featured in Gastroenterology reveal that individuals who stuck to a personalized diet regimen guided by the test saw significant symptom alleviation, surpassing those on a sham elimination diet. This underscores the efficacy of the inFoods® IBS blood test in improving the well-being of patients with IBS.

news.headline: Constellation ahead of schedule in launching Crane Clean Energy Center, restarting Three Mile Island Unit 1 within five months.
news.summary: In LONDONDERRY TOWNSHIP, Pennsylvania, Constellation announced its intention to resume operations at Three Mile Island Unit 1 and establish the Crane Clean Energy Center. Despite initial plans, the company is progressing quicker than expected, with the restart of Three Mile Island Unit 1 and the development of the Crane Clean Energy Center currently ahead of schedule by five months.

news.headline: Hallmark's 2025 survey reveals flexibility now equals pay in nurse satisfaction, shaping healthcare workforce trends.
news.summary: In Charlestown, Massachusetts, a prominent healthcare workforce management technology company, Hallmark, released the outcomes of its recent study, the 2025 Evolving Healthcare Workforce Trends Survey. The survey reveals a notable change in perspectives, showing that flexibility has become just as crucial as salary when it comes to workforce choices. This shift is altering how healthcare institutions need to adjust to appeal to and keep skilled workers. Hallmark's CEO, Bruce Cerullo, stated, "The healthcare sector is undergoing a significant transformation." Key findings point to high levels of burnout and a growing emphasis on flexibility among employees. This shift underscores the need for healthcare organizations to rethink their strategies for talent attraction and retention.

news.headline: Stablecoins' $220B market cap surges by 74%, but their main impact is in crypto rather than mainstream payments.
news.summary: A recent report by Bernstein reveals that stablecoins have seen a substantial growth with a market capitalization of around $220 billion, which is a 74% increase from the previous year. However, their main use case remains within crypto capital markets rather than traditional payment systems. The report states that stablecoins are primarily utilized for crypto trading, lending applications, and decentralized finance. While they may not have a significant role in consumer payments due to existing efficient financial systems like ACH and RTP, stablecoins are making headway in cross-border transactions. The article suggests that stablecoins are more of a solution without a problem in the realm of domestic payments, as credit cards currently dominate with added benefits like chargeback protection and fraud prevention.

news.headline: Genprex in Austin advances diabetes program with non-viral delivery system, acquires strategic collaboration in Feb. 2025.
news.summary: Genprex, a company based in Austin, Texas, recently announced a strategic collaboration involving a potentially re-dosable non-viral delivery system for novel diabetes gene therapy. This partnership aims to position Genprex as a leading player in the diabetes market. The collaboration involves a Contract Development and Manufacturing Organization (CDMO) partner. The announcement was made on February 19, 2025. This move signifies a significant step in the company's efforts to pioneer innovative solutions in the diabetes field.

news.headline: Rumble and TRUTH Social sue Brazilian judge over censorship targeting U.S. users; filed in US court. #FreeSpeech
news.summary: In Longboat Key, Florida, on Feb. 19, 2025, Rumble, a video-sharing platform and cloud services provider listed on NASDAQ, has initiated legal action alongside the Trump Media & Technology Group (TMTG - owners of TRUTH Social). The lawsuit targets Brazilian Supreme Court Justice Alexandre de Moraes for allegedly violating the First Amendment's free speech protections. Moraes had ordered the suspension of U.S.-based accounts belonging to a prominent politically vocal user. The suit was filed in the U.S. District Court for the Middle District of Florida, aiming to establish that de Moraes' directives hold no legal weight in the United States. It is noteworthy that neither Rumble nor TMTG maintain any presence in Brazil in terms of entities, operations, employees, bank accounts, or business operations.

news.headline: M Group Strategic Communications introduces Capital Markets Advisory Group for blockchain businesses, offering institutional-grade communications. (Character count: 110)
news.summary: A specialized team has been launched in New York on Feb. 19, 2025, by M Group Strategic Communications to cater to mid-stage and mature businesses in the blockchain sector. The team aims to offer institutional-grade communication services to help these businesses expand beyond the crypto markets. M Group Strategic Communications is recognized as one of the top communication firms globally.

news.headline: Data443 forges partnership with TierPoint to enhance data center reach, adding x new centers.
news.summary: In recent developments, it has been reported that the stock prices of XYZ Corporation have skyrocketed by over 50% in just the past week. This increase has pushed the company's market capitalization to an impressive $1.5 billion. Analysts attribute this surge to the successful launch of their new product line, which has exceeded expectations and generated significant buzz in the market. The CEO of XYZ Corporation has expressed optimism about the company's future prospects and has hinted at further growth opportunities on the horizon. This impressive performance has caught the attention of investors and industry experts alike, with many keeping a close eye on the company's next moves.

news.headline: New AAMI standards include chlorine dioxide for high-level disinfection in healthcare - boosts efficiency for ultrasound transducers. (Characters: 120)
news.summary: Cutting-edge foam and wipe solution provides rapid, effective, and cost-effective high-level disinfection for ultrasound transducers and probes in FAIRFIELD, N.J. on February 19, 2025. The revised standard developed by the Association for the Advancement of Medical Instrumentation (AAMI) and implemented...

news.headline: Steelcase appoints Megan Blazina as new Chief Legal Officer and Secretary effective March 17, 2025. #leadership #Steelcase
news.summary: A major company in the field of workplace design and research, Steelcase (NYSE: SCS), headquartered in Grand Rapids, Michigan, revealed on February 19, 2025, that Megan Blazina is set to assume the role of vice president, chief legal officer, and secretary starting from March 17, 2025. This appointment highlights the company's commitment to strengthening its leadership team.

news.headline: EV startup Nikola, formerly exciting investors, declares bankruptcy after failing to translate plans for electric and hydrogen trucks into profitability.
news.summary: The company, formerly a top performer with a soaring stock price, encountered difficulties in transforming its initiatives for electric and hydrogen trucks into a profitable venture.

news.headline: Investors cautiously eye Russia's potential, as Western firms weigh returning amid peace talks post many leaving 3 years ago.
news.summary: Investors are showing interest in potential peace talks, despite the challenges faced by Western businesses that had withdrawn from the country just three years ago.

news.headline: Atos aids Invictus Games 2025, held in Vancouver and Whistler, achieving new milestones.
Anomalix adds cybersecurity veteran Fred Bement to Advisory Board, bringing 40 years of experience in enterprise sales.
news.summary: Anomalix, a reputable company specializing in Identity and Access Management solutions, recently revealed that Fred Bement, a seasoned professional with more than 40 years of expertise in enterprise sales and cybersecurity, has become a new addition to its Advisory Board. This strategic move is expected to bring valuable insights and guidance to the company’s operations.

news.headline: DiscoverE announces 2025 Future City winners who engineered floating cities tackling rising seas, celebrating innovative students.
news.summary: The 2025 Future City® global STEM Competition winners were revealed by DiscoverE (Discover Engineering) in Washington on February 19. This year's competition focused on the theme "Above the Current," showcasing the talents of middle and high school students. The competition highlighted innovative solutions from students worldwide.

news.headline: Direxion launches LMBO and REKT ETFs, providing different ways to invest in blockchain. Crypto market value grew from $1.99T to $3.14T in a year. Millennials hold 17% of wealth in digital assets. 10,000+ digital coins in circulation.
news.summary: The total value of all virtual currencies in the blockchain ecosystem has increased from $1.99 trillion to $3.14 trillion in the past year, showing a 60% expansion. The number of digital coins and tokens in circulation has grown from 66 in 2013 to over 10,000 today. Wealthy millennials who identify as conservative investors are allocating an average of 17% of their portfolio to cryptocurrencies, indicating a generational shift in risk management. This demonstrates the growing integration of digital assets into mainstream society beyond blind speculation.

news.headline: Sectigo launches CaaS for partners to manage digital certificates, revolutionizes SSL/PKI resellers.
news.summary: In Scottsdale, Arizona, Sectigo has introduced Sectigo CaaS, a service tailored for SSL/PKI resellers, domain registrars, web hosts, and MSPs. This new solution streamlines certificate management by providing automated lifecycle management and domain validation processes through a unified API. This offering aims to help partners anticipate their customers' certificate requirements effectively. Specifically designed for industry professionals, Sectigo CaaS offers a comprehensive approach to certificate needs.

news.headline: FlowPath CMMS introduces AI Assistant for facility management to enhance efficiency with real-time insights.
news.summary: A new AI Assistant has been introduced by FlowPath in Atlanta to streamline work order processing, predictive maintenance, and asset management. This innovative tool provides real-time insights for facility teams, enhancing operational efficiency.

news.headline: Blue Door Realty Group joins Property.ca on December 4, 2024, meeting TRREB and RECO compliance, strengthening talent roster.
news.summary: Property.ca Inc. Brokerage has reached a significant milestone in its expansion by integrating Blue Door Realty Group (Blue Door) into its operations as of December 4, 2024. This successful transition ensures that Blue Door now operates under the umbrella of Property.ca, adhering to all Toronto Regional Real Estate Board (TRREB) and Real Estate Council of Ontario (RECO) compliance regulations. This move signifies a strategic advancement in Property.ca's dedication to consolidating its presence in the real estate market.

news.headline: Global Talent PR introduces new EB-1A Visa Media Services with Judging and Membership programs, enhancing their offerings.
news.summary: A renowned agency focused on exceptional ability visa applications, Global Talent PR, revealed its new Judging and Membership programs on Feb. 19, 2025. The programs aim to enhance the company's services for EB-1A and O-1 visa applicants. Based in Washington and Portland, the agency caters to individuals with remarkable talent by offering specialized assistance. This new development showcases the company's commitment to providing comprehensive support in the visa application process.

news.headline: Moso Networks introduces new 5G outdoor radio & AI platform, to showcase at MWC Barcelona. Canopy 5GOD2 launched; products & solutions integration displayed at Booth CS34.
news.summary: At MWC Barcelona, Moso will unveil its latest products and partner solutions at Booth CS34. The US-based company, Moso Networks, renowned for its private wireless technology, revealed the Moso Canopy 5GOD2, a new high-power 5G outdoor radio on Feb. 19, 2025.

news.headline: Ameresco approved for streetlight project in New Orleans, using LED lights & smart tech to enhance efficiency.
news.summary: A leading energy solutions provider, Ameresco, Inc. (NYSE: AMRC), has received approval for a streetlight technology pilot in New Orleans. The project aims to enhance the city's streetlighting infrastructure by incorporating advanced LED lights and smart city technology. This initiative is expected to improve energy efficiency and public safety in New Orleans. The pilot project is set to revolutionize the city's current system, reflecting Ameresco's commitment to assisting customers in navigating the energy transition.

news.headline: Corvias, Sunstone Energy, and City, Light & Power completed Phase III energy project at Fort Riley, supporting DOD goals.
news.summary: Located in Fort Riley, Kansas, the completion of Phase III of an energy independence and security initiative was announced by Corvias, a prominent energy and infrastructure solutions provider, in conjunction with Sunstone Energy Development and City, Light & Power. This project at the U.S. Army Garrison Fort Riley has been operational for a month, as part of efforts to bolster the U.S. Department of Defense's operational resilience and readiness objectives. With the aim of supporting the Department of Defense's goal to ensure self-sufficiency, this initiative marks a significant milestone in enhancing the energy infrastructure.

news.headline: Luca Mining Corp. named to TSXV Top 50 list of top performing companies for 2025. (Total of 50 companies included)
news.summary: Luca Mining Corp. (Luca), a company based in Vancouver, BC, shared exciting news on Feb. 19, 2025. Luca, listed as LUCA on the TSX Venture Exchange and as LUCMF on OTCQX and Frankfurt as Z68, proudly revealed its inclusion in the prestigious 2025 TSX Venture 50TM. This list recognizes the top-performing companies in the industry and serves as an annual ranking of leading entities. Luca's presence on this esteemed list signifies its outstanding performance and success in the market.

news.headline: Escalade, Inc. will announce Q4 and full year 2024 results before a conference call set for Feb. 19, 2025.
news.summary: In Evansville, Indiana on February 19, 2025, Escalade, Inc. disclosed that they will be releasing their financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. Escalade, Inc., a prominent company in the sporting goods and recreational equipment sector, operates under the ticker symbol NASDAQ: ESCA. Stay tuned for the upcoming announcement to learn more about their performance during this period.

news.headline: Avantor to present at TD Cowen's 45th Annual Health Care Conference. President and CEO Michael Stubblefield will represent.
news.summary: In Radnor, Pennsylvania on February 19, 2025, Avantor, Inc. (NYSE: AVTR), a prominent global supplier of essential products and services to clients in life sciences and advanced technology sectors, revealed that their President and CEO, Michael Stubblefield, is scheduled to speak at TD.

news.headline: IMUNON reports higher IL-12 levels in advanced ovarian cancer patients receiving 100mg/m2 IMNN-001 dose, 20% increase vs 79mg/m2 dose.
news.summary: New data supports the dose-dependent mechanism of IMNN-001, showing that the 100mg/m2 dose leads to a 20% increase in IL-12 levels compared to the 79mg/m2 dose. This indicates that higher doses of IMNN-001 result in greater elevation of IL-12 levels.

news.headline: OrthoPediatrics Corp. will announce Q4 and FY 2024 financial results on March 4, 2025 after market close. Conference call at 4:30 p.m. ET.
news.summary: Warsaw, Indiana-based company OrthoPediatrics Corp. is set to report its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024 on March 4, 2025, after the market closes. The company, trading on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol KIDS, specializes in pediatric orthopedics. A conference call is scheduled to take place on the same day at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time to delve into the details of the results.

news.headline: Vision Life Holdings introduces UTEX Eco Ink, revolutionizing textile printing with no fabric pre- and post-processing.
news.summary: A new type of textile printing ink is revolutionizing the global textile dyeing sector by enabling Direct-to-Product (DTP) printing without the need for pre- and post-processing of fabrics. This innovation significantly decreases both time and expenses involved in the process. Furthermore, it contributes to environmental sustainability by addressing ecological issues through the development of eco-friendly ink technology. UTEX Eco Ink, the pioneering product, is at the forefront of this advancement, making a profound impact on the industry.
